em_dash_detector: regex catches —, –, ‐, ‒, ―, ' -- ' (padded double-hyphen), and ' - ' (spaced single hyphen — the OCR'd em-dash form in crystal_shard and halflings_gem). Hyphenated compounds (Catti-brie, Ten-Towns) are excluded by requiring whitespace on both sides of the lone hyphen variant.
shape_classification_priority: IN_DIALOGUE — inside a quoted string envelope
BRACKETED — paired em-dashes within ≤30 words on the same side of any sentence terminator
LIST_INTRO — followed by ≥2 comma-separated short items (≤8 words each)
overall_reason: 3/4 per-kind shape top-2 PASS (4/4 ≥ PASS_PARTIAL); in-dialogue interrupt rate is not cross-book-stable (per-book stylistic variation, not a corpus-wide prior)
